attempts.strategy: pullback-along-section bridge: extract η_G as a scheme morphism Spec k ⟶ G.left via definitional reduction of the terminal of Over (Spec k); take Γ on the top open; compose with Scheme.ΓSpecIso to land a ring map ψ : Γ(G.left, ⊤) ⟶ k; evaluate relativeDifferentialsPresheaf G.hom at op ⊤; extend scalars along ψ
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def lieAlgebra (G : Over (Spec (.of k))) [CategoryTheory.GrpObj G] [SmoothOfRelativeDimension 1 G.hom] [IsProper G.hom] [GeometricallyIrreducible G.hom] : ModuleCat k := let ηleft : Spec (.of k) ⟶ G.left := CategoryTheory.CommaMorphism.left η[G]; let ψ : Γ(G.left, ⊤) ⟶ CommRingCat.of k := ηleft.appTop ≫ (Scheme.ΓSpecIso (.of k)).hom; let M := Scheme.relativeDifferentialsPresheaf G.hom; (ModuleCat.extendScalars ψ.hom).obj (M.obj (op ⊤))

attempts.insight: Lean definitionally identifies (𝟙_ (Over (Spec (.of k)))).left = Spec (.of k); CommaMorphism.left η[G] typechecks as Spec (.of k) ⟶ G.left with zero explicit coercion. Combined with Scheme.ΓSpecIso, this supplies the entire 'evaluate-at-identity' plumbing without engaging the PresheafOfModules.pullback functor (whose (pushforward φ).IsRightAdjoint instance is non-trivial in the scheme setting).
